properties.body:
[South-eastern Baltic] LITHUANIAN NAV WARN 019/26
SOUTH-EASTERN BALTIC
LITHUANIAN COAST – MILITARY EXERCISES
MILITARY EXERCISES 1100–1400 UTC DAILY
25 AND 26 MAR IN AREA EYD-18, CENTERED
IN 55-29.6N 020-51.0E.
AREA TEMPORARILY DANGEROUS TO SHIPPING.
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
CANCEL THIS MSG 261500 UTC MAR 26.
